The Stay

Simple, spotless rooms
with a warm welcome.

Sekar Inn is a friendly roadside stay built for real journeys — solo drivers pulling in late, families passing through, and groups who need a whole room to themselves.

Every room is freshly kept, well-lit, and comes with an attached bathroom. Choose air-conditioned comfort or a breezy non-AC room, sleep two or sleep ten — the welcome is the same either way.

Free high-speed Wi-Fi
Full power backup
On-site Indian Bank ATM
24×7 reception

Guest stories

Trusted by travellers across Tamil Nadu.

4.8 Based on 214 guest reviews

We stopped here late on our drive from Madurai to Chennai. The AC room was clean, the beds were comfortable, and the front desk got us checked in within minutes. Exactly the kind of rest we needed.

AS
Arun Selvam
MaduraiDouble Room · AC

I drive lorries on this route and stay here often. The driver room is quiet, the bed is clean, and there is safe parking right on site. For the price, you will not find better rest on this stretch.

PT
Palanivel Thangaraj
SalemDriver Room · Non-AC

The king suite was a pleasant surprise — the false ceiling and soft lighting made it feel far nicer than the price suggests. Perfect for our family of six travelling from Kanyakumari. Highly recommend.

KI
Kavitha Iyer
KanyakumariKing Suite · AC

Travelled with my parents on a temple trip and we took the queen suite. Plenty of space for five of us, spotlessly clean bathroom, and the staff were so respectful with the elders. Will stay again.

LK
Lakshmi Krishnamoorthy
KumbakonamQueen Suite · AC

Booked the 10-sharing hall for our college group of nine. It was roomy, well ventilated, and unbelievably affordable. The reception was open when we reached at midnight. Great experience overall.

DV
Divya Venkatesan
Tiruchirappalli10-Sharing · Non-AC

Reached very late with my family and the power backup kept the AC running through a night outage without a hitch. On-site ATM was handy too. Clean, safe and friendly — everything a traveller needs.

GR
Gokul Ramasamy
Erode4-Sharing Room · AC

Good value for money and a very convenient stop right off the highway. The Wi-Fi was quick enough for me to finish some work in the evening. Only small thing — could use a few more plug points.

MR
Muthukumar Rajendran
CoimbatoreTriple Room · AC

Comfortable non-AC room with lovely wooden flooring and a nice breeze at night. Housekeeping came every morning without us asking. A simple, honest place that takes good care of its guests.

SN
Senthil Nadar
TirunelveliTriple Room · Non-AC

Stayed one night on the way to Rameswaram. Booking over the phone was easy and the room was ready when we arrived. Neat, comfortable and reasonably priced. A dependable choice for pilgrims.

MP
Meenakshi Pandian
ThanjavurDouble Room · AC

We stopped here late on our drive from Madurai to Chennai. The AC room was clean, the beds were comfortable, and the front desk got us checked in within minutes. Exactly the kind of rest we needed.
